questionHtml: State whether it is valid to use the regression line y on x for Jason’s estimate. Give a reason for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
not reliable         A1

extrapolation OR outside the given range of the data         R1

 

Note: Do not award A1R0. Only accept reasoning that includes reference to the range of the data. Do not accept a contextual reason such as 1.5 hours is too short to read the book.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: State whether it is valid to use the regression line y on x for Jason’s estimate. Give a reason for your answer.
